user.title: Add a LEGO hub
user.description: Select the LEGO Powered Up hub to control. Make sure it is powered on and not connected to anything else.

settings.title: Motor settings
settings.description: Configure how the motor on {name} is driven. Tip: running the motor at full speed can make the LEGO Piano (21323) gears skip, so the default speed is 50%.

data_description.port: The hub port the motor is plugged into. External ports are A=0, B=1, C=2 and D=3.
data_description.speed: Starting speed (1-100%). You can change it live afterwards with the Speed control. Full speed may skip the piano gears.
data_description.direction: Which way the motor turns when running.
data_description.stop_action: Whether the motor coasts (float) or actively holds (brake) when stopped.

abort.already_configured: This LEGO hub is already configured
abort.no_devices_found: No unconfigured LEGO hubs found in Bluetooth range

data_description.port: The hub port the motor is plugged into. External ports are A=0, B=1, C=2 and D=3.
data_description.speed: Starting speed (1-100%). The live Speed control overrides this. Full speed may skip the piano gears.
data_description.direction: Which way the motor turns when running.
data_description.stop_action: Whether the motor coasts (float) or actively holds (brake) when stopped.
